zh.Cowlam, East Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾考拉姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Hutchinson於大約1350年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾考拉姆時，他的父親Barnard Hutchinson Esquire11348歲，母親Mary Beatrice de Boyville44歲。他於大約1401年與Edith de Wouldbie在英國英格蘭越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁考拉姆結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1425年在英國爾斯托普特享年77歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.Cowlam, East Riding, Yorkshire, England: 英国英格兰越可爾考拉姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Hutchinson于大约1350年出生在英国英格兰越可爾考拉姆时，他的父亲Barnard Hutchinson Esquire11348岁，母亲Mary Beatrice de Boyville44岁。他于大约1401年与Edith de Wouldbie在英国英格兰越可爾 易亞斯特 利丁考拉姆结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于大约1425年在英国爾斯托普特享年77岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When John Hutchinson was born about 1350, in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Barnard Hutchinson Esquire, was 11348 and his mother, Mary Beatrice de Boyville, was 44. He married Edith de Wouldbie about 1401, in Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. He died about 1425, in Stockport, Cheshire, England, at the age of 77, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Hutchinson est né environ 1350, à Cowlam, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Barnard Hutchinson Esquire, avait 11348 ans et sa mère, Mary Beatrice de Boyville, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Edith de Wouldbie environ 1401, à Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé environ 1425, à Stockport, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Hutchinson um 1350 in Cowlam, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Barnard Hutchinson Esquire 11348 und seine Mutter Mary Beatrice de Boyville 44. Er hat um 1401 in Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, England, United Kingdom Edith de Wouldbie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Er starb um 1425 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Stockport, Cheshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Hutchinson è nato il circa 1350 nel Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Barnard Hutchinson Esquire, aveva 11348 anni e il suo madre, Mary Beatrice de Boyville, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Edith de Wouldbie circa 1401, nel Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1425, nel Stockport, Cheshire, England, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.Yorkshire, England: イギリスヨークシュアイア
ja.Stockport, Cheshire, England: イギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルト
ja.lifeSummary: John Hutchinsonが約1350年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコウラムで生まれた時，父Barnard Hutchinson Esquireは11348歳，母Mary Beatrice de Boyvilleは44歳であった。約1401年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイア エアスト リディングコウラムでEdith de Wouldbieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は約1425年にイギリスチェシュアイアストクプオルトで77歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Hutchinson(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 코우램에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Barnard Hutchinson Esquire(은)는 11348세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Beatrice de Boyville(은)는 44세였다. 그는 대략 1401년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 코우램에서 Edith de Wouldbie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1425년 영국 체실르 스톡포트에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

mg.Abt 1350–about 1425: tany ho any amin'ny 1350–tany ho any amin'ny 1425

mn.Cowlam, East Riding, Yorkshire, England: Cowlam, Eoferwic, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Hutchinson nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Barnard Hutchinson Esquire, tinha 11348 anos e sua mãe, Mary Beatrice de Boyville, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith de Wouldbie aproximadamente 1401, em Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1425, em Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Hutchinson родился около 1350 г. в местности коулэм, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Barnard Hutchinson Esquire было 11348 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Beatrice de Boyville, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith de Wouldbie около 1401 г. в местности коулэм, еркшир эаст ридинг, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Он умер около 1425 г. в местности стоккпорт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

sm.Abt 1350–about 1425: e tusa o le 1350–e tusa o le 1425

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Hutchinson nació aproximadamente 1350, en Cowlam, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Barnard Hutchinson Esquire, tenía 11348 años y su mamá, Mary Beatrice de Boyville, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Edith de Wouldbie aproximadamente 1401, en Cowlam, Yorkshire East Riding, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1425, en Stockport, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
